title: All-Terrain Attack Vehicle
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Pet |image= |name=All-Terrain Attack Vehicle
"AT-AV" |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] |species=[[Pittin]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin=[[Color/Legends|Pale pink]] |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= |owners=[[Tia Organa]] }} '''All-Terrain Attack Vehicle''', or '''AT-AV''' for short, was the nickname of a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[pittin]] that was a pet belonging to [[Tia Organa]], one of [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa's]] adoptive aunts on [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. As a child, Leia had named the creature herself. AT-AV had a pale candy-pink [[Color/Legends|color]] and was small enough to fit in Leia's cupped hands. She also liked to roll on her back and bat at Leia's braids and [[Starblossom/Legends|starblossom]] petals. AT-AV died in the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction of Alderaan]]. ==Appearances== *[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1stm}} *[[Children of the Jedi (abridged audiobook)|''Children of the Jedi'' abridged audiobook]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:House of Organa]] [[Category:Named pets]] [[Category:Pittins]]
